The '''''Mon Remonda''''' was the first [[Mon Calamari Shipyards/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[MC80B Star Cruiser]] delivered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. One of the most advanced and heavily armed vessels in the Alliance fleet, it was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Onoma]] and served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Zsinj]]-hunting [[Solo Fleet|task force]].

==History==
[[File:MonRemonda2-FF.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A side view of the ''Mon Remonda'']]

The ''Mon Remonda'' participated in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]], during which it captured the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Triumph (Victory-class)|''Triumph'']]. After the ''Triumph'' lost its shields, the ''Mon Remonda'' engaged it with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] fire, damaging it enough that [[Assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttles]] were able to safely join in directly attacking it. The ''Triumph'' soon lost its power and started sliding back into the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] atmosphere, forcing Onoma to use his [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] to pull it along and accelerate its orbit.<ref name="Wedge's Gamble">''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]''</ref>

Some years later, the ''Mon Remonda'' served as the [[Solo Fleet]] flagship in the search for Warlord Zsinj. ''Mon Remonda'' provided enough firepower to foil Zsinj's attempt to capture a second [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]], the ''[[Razor's Kiss]]'', destroying the ship and heavily damaging the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord's]] flagship, [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']]. ''Mon Remonda'' also suffered relatively heavy damage. After repairs at the [[Fondor Shipyards/Legends|Fondor Shipyards]], it played a pivotal role in the climactic [[Battle of Selaggis]] that signaled the end of the campaign.

[[File:Solo_Command_by_Chris_Trevas.jpg|thumb|left|Han Solo commanding ''Mon Remonda'']]
The ''Mon Remonda'' carried four [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. While hunting Zsinj, these included [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]], [[Wraith Squadron|Wraith]], [[Nova Squadron|Nova]] and [[Polearm Squadron|Polearm]] squadrons.

The cruiser continued to serve the New Republic, but was destroyed in the [[Battle of Calamari]] by the [[World Devastator]], ''[[Silencer-7]]''. Before the vessel went down, it managed to destroy a Star Destroyer and several support craft saving thousands of Mon Calamari and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] lives. All hands were lost.<ref name="TEGtVaV" />
